## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Jazmia Henry's simulation environments and Marcel Santilli's AI-powered content creation company.](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both parties expressed strong interest in collaborating, seeing mutual benefits in combining technical expertise with business acumen](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) is experiencing rapid growth, generating \~2M words/month for clients, and approaching $2M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Jazmia's simulation environments could potentially streamline and enhance fwd.digital's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Both agreed to further discussions on specific use cases and potential advisory roles for each other](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

## Topics

### Current State of fwd.digital

  - [Approaching $2M ARR, with 14 customers and 7 new hires](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Generating \~2M words/month for clients](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Main offering: 100,000 words/month for $9,000](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Clients include Reddit and other high-profile companies](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Considering raising $5M by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Jazmia's Recent Developments

  - [Released a shot simulation to the public, garnering 150+ downloads in a day](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Simulation can answer various types of questions (QA, math, reasoning)](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Working on building and refining simulation environments](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Streamlining fwd.digital's research and content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Developing a "research agent" to capture customer context efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Improving adaptation and customization of content for each client](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Enhancing SEO performance of generated content](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Exploring ways to reduce reliance on extensive prompts and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Technical Discussions

  - [Importance of job-to-be-done approach in AI product development](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Challenges with current prompt-based systems and RAG patterns](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Potential of simulation environments to improve AI outputs without extensive prompting](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Discussion on perplexity API and its limitations](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Fundraising and Advisory Roles

  - [Jazmia considering starting fundraising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Marcel offered to provide a letter of interest for VCs](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Both expressed interest in potentially advising each other's companies](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [Discussed strategies for pitching to non-technical executives and investors](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up call to discuss specific use cases and project scope](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Jazmia to send project specification and architecture details](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Marcel to provide access to workflows, customer call recordings, and other relevant materials](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Explore potential NDA signing before deeper technical discussions](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Marcel to draft a letter of interest for Jazmia's fundraising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Both to consider formal advisory roles in each other's companies](https://fathom.video/share/s3J6xaqsX3G1H7tzt7JLhn8N747d1CRe?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
